author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Result: Fixed benchmark harness — changed bench() from FnMut() to FnMut() -> R with black_box on return value, preventing compiler from optimizing away unused tensor allocations. Added .contiguous() to permute benchmark to match PyTorch's permute+contiguous test. Also fixed API drift (sum_dim/mean_dim keepdim arg, cat slice type, GRU hidden state arg). Permute now measures 2,123 us (4.6x slower than PyTorch's 460 us) instead of bogus 0.0 us.
